where.if: AND CAST(user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND (promotion_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%') OR promote_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%'))
AND ( CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderKey}, '%') OR IFNULL(order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderKey}, '%') )
AND (IFNULL(external_order_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{externalKey}, '%') OR IFNULL(external_order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{externalKey}, '%'))
AND CAST(r.user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND (r.promotion_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%') OR r.promote_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{promotionId}, '%'))
AND ( CAST(r.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderKey}, '%') OR IFNULL(r.order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderKey}, '%') )
AND (IFNULL(r.external_order_id,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{externalKey}, '%') OR IFNULL(r.external_order_no,'') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{externalKey}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_records ( id, order_no, user_id, drama_id, drama_name, amount, coins, payment_status, pay_status, promotion_id, promote_id, new_user_id, is_first_recharge, is_new_user, local_register_time, local_order_time, local_time, country, external_order_id, external_order_no, payment_method, platform, ad_account_id, ad_account_name, callback_sent, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{dramaId}, #{dramaName}, #{amount}, #{coins}, #{paymentStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{promotionId}, #{promoteId}, #{newUserId}, #{isFirstRecharge}, #{isNewUser}, #{localRegisterTime}, #{localOrderTime}, #{localTime}, #{country}, #{externalOrderId}, #{externalOrderNo}, #{paymentMethod}, #{platform}, #{adAccountId}, #{adAccountName}, #{callbackSent}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_records SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, drama_id = #{dramaId}, drama_name = #{dramaName}, amount = #{amount}, coins = #{coins}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, promotion_id = #{promotionId}, promote_id = #{promoteId}, new_user_id = #{newUserId}, is_first_recharge = #{isFirstRecharge}, is_new_user = #{isNewUser}, local_register_time = #{localRegisterTime}, local_order_time = #{localOrderTime}, local_time = #{localTime}, country = #{country}, external_order_id = #{externalOrderId}, external_order_no = #{externalOrderNo}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, platform = #{platform}, ad_account_id = #{adAccountId}, ad_account_name = #{adAccountName}, callback_sent = #{callbackSent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ( IFNULL(payment_status,'') = 'pending' OR LOWER(IFNULL(pay_status,'')) IN ('pending','unpaid') ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ( IFNULL(payment_status,'') = 'paid' OR LOWER(IFNULL(pay_status,'')) IN ('paid','success') ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ( IFNULL(payment_status,'') = 'failed' OR LOWER(IFNULL(pay_status,'')) = 'failed' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ( IFNULL(payment_status,'') = 'paid' OR LOWER(IFNULL(pay_status,'')) IN ('paid','success') ) THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_first_recharge = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS first_recharge_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_new_user = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_user_count FROM recharge_records

SELECT r.*, u.username AS join_username, u.promote_id AS join_user_promote_id, u.country AS join_user_country FROM recharge_records r LEFT JOIN users u ON (r.user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci) = (CAST(u.id AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci) OR (u.user_code IS NOT NULL AND (r.user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci) = (u.user_code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci))
ORDER BY COALESCE(r.local_order_time, r.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_records WHERE IFNULL(payment_status,'') = 'pending' OR LOWER(IFNULL(pay_status,'')) IN ('pending','unpaid')
